title: Philemon, Chapter 1
description: The complete text of Philemon chapter 1 from the King James Version (1611), translated from the Textus Receptus Greek.
introduction: The complete text of Philemon chapter 1 from the King James Version (1611), translated from the Textus Receptus Greek.

translation.original_text: <sup>1</sup>παυλος δεσμιος χριστου ιησου και τιμοθεος ο αδελφος φιλημονι τω αγαπητω και συνεργω ημων
translation.text: <sup>1</sup>Paul, a prisoner of Jesus Christ, and Timothy our brother, unto Philemon our dearly beloved, and fellowlabourer,
